content.problemStatement:
Write a program to find the sum of individual digits of a 3-digits number.


Input Format
Take a 3-digits integer number.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Since the number is not a 3-digit number, so output will be this "Please enter a valid 3-digit number."

code.Python3:
# Ask the user to enter a 3-digit number
number = int(input())

# Ensure the number is a 3-digit number
if number < 100 or number > 999:
    print("Please enter a valid 3-digit number.")
else:
    # Calculate the sum of the digits
    sum_of_digits = 0
    while number != 0:
        digit = number % 10  # Get the last digit
        sum_of_digits += digit  # Add the digit to the sum
        number //= 10  # Remove the last digit from the number

    # Print the sum of the digits
    print(sum_of_digits)
